description_long: This object is a classic cash register with a rectangular base and a slightly sloped top surface featuring a prominent keypad area. The front side has a visible slot, likely for the cash drawer, and the top includes a raised display screen angled toward the user. A tall, vertical pole extends from the back, supporting a customer-facing display screen. The keypad consists of several large, rectangular buttons arranged in a grid, and the overall body is constructed from a smooth, light-colored material. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, and the cash register appears robust and functional for use in retail or service environments. The object is primarily light gray or white, with darker accents on the screens and pole.
description: A classic, light-colored cash register with a sloped keypad, front cash drawer slot, and dual display screens, including a customer-facing pole display. The design is robust and functional, with a smooth, utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cash drawer slot, sloped keypad, and the main display screen angled toward the user.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped keypad, the main display screen, and the tall pole with the customer-facing display.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the register and the customer-facing display screen mounted on the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keypad, main display, and the pole with the customer display from a different angle.
attribute_keypad_layout: 10 rectangular keys in a numeric grid layout, no visible labeling
